{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart LR subgraph Input Sources OPT[Constructor Options] SET[fable.settings.MongoDB] end subgraph Normalization NORM["Property Mapping
Server -> host
Port -> port
User -> user
Password -> password
Database -> database
ConnectionPoolLimit -> maxPoolSize"] end subgraph Output URI["Connection URI
mongodb://[user:pass@]host:port/db"] POOL["Pool Config
{ maxPoolSize: N }"] end OPT --> NORM SET --> NORM NORM --> URI NORM --> POOL ","style":"notebook"}
